name: Streusel Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: Salt 2 1/4 c Cooking apples, finely chpd, peeled (2-3 apples)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix the egg, sour cream, sugar, flour, and vanilla until well combined.
3. Add salt and finely chopped apples to the mixture; gently fold in the grated lemon peel.
4. Pour the apple filling into the unbaked pie shell.
5. Sprinkle streusel topping evenly over the filling.
6. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
7. Let cool before serving.
